subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath ever been and shall eternally be even as He hath been, Who hath subdued the world through a movement of His Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کان و یکون بمثل ما قد کان الذی سخر العالم بحرکه من قلمه الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
